changeSet.author: cloud-code
changeSet.sql: UPDATE task_model t SET status_id = ( SELECT ts.id FROM task_status ts WHERE ts.project_id = t.project_id AND ts.viewed = TRUE ORDER BY ts.priority ASC LIMIT 1) WHERE t.status_id IN ( SELECT b.id FROM task_status b WHERE LOWER(b.code) = 'backlog' OR (b.viewed = FALSE AND b.default_task_status = TRUE));

changeSet.author: cloud-code
changeSet.sql:
-- default переезжает на первую видимую колонку в проектах, где -- default был скрытым (новая схема) или носил имя backlog UPDATE task_status ts SET default_task_status = TRUE WHERE ts.id = ( SELECT ts2.id FROM task_status ts2 WHERE ts2.project_id = ts.project_id AND ts2.viewed = TRUE ORDER BY ts2.priority ASC LIMIT 1) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task_status b WHERE b.project_id = ts.project_id AND b.default_task_status = TRUE AND (b.viewed = FALSE OR LOWER(b.code) = 'backlog'));
UPDATE task_status SET default_task_status = FALSE WHERE default_task_status = TRUE AND (viewed = FALSE OR LOWER(code) = 'backlog');

changeSet.author: cloud-code
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM task_status WHERE LOWER(code) = 'backlog' AND viewed = FALSE;
